ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦٓ أَنْ أَنذِرْ قَوْمَكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people, [saying], "Warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment."

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦٓ أَنْ أَنذِرْ قَوْمَكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people, [saying], "Warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment."

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦٓ أَنْ أَنذِرْ قَوْمَكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people, [saying], "Warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment."

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦٓ أَنْ أَنذِرْ قَوْمَكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people, [saying], "Warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment."

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦٓ أَنْ أَنذِرْ قَوْمَكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people, [saying], "Warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment."

targetTranslation: before (connected to أَن يَأْتِيَهُمْ - that it comes to them)
ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦٓ أَنْ أَنذِرْ قَوْمَكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people, [saying], "Warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment."

targetTranslation: comes to them (punishment comes to them)
ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦٓ أَنْ أَنذِرْ قَوْمَكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people, [saying], "Warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment."

targetTranslation: a punishment (subject of يَأْتِيَهُمْ - comes to them)
ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦٓ أَنْ أَنذِرْ قَوْمَكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people, [saying], "Warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment."

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦٓ أَنْ أَنذِرْ قَوْمَكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people, [saying], "Warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment."

ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰقَوْمِ إِنِّى لَكُمْ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: He said, "O my people, indeed I am to you a clear warner -

ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰقَوْمِ إِنِّى لَكُمْ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: He said, "O my people, indeed I am to you a clear warner -

targetTranslation: one who makes very clear (describing نَذِيرٌ)
ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰقَوْمِ إِنِّى لَكُمْ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: He said, "O my people, indeed I am to you a clear warner -

ayahArabic: أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَٱتَّقُوهُ وَأَطِيعُونِ
ayahEnglish: To worship Allāh, fear Him and obey me.

targetTranslation: Allah (the one true God who is being worshipped in أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟)
ayahArabic: أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَٱتَّقُوهُ وَأَطِيعُونِ
ayahEnglish: To worship Allāh, fear Him and obey me.

targetTranslation: he will forgive (as a result of following Allah's command)
ayahArabic: يَغْفِرْ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمْ وَيُؤَخِّرْكُمْ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّى إِنَّ أَجَلَ ٱللَّهِ إِذَا جَآءَ لَا يُؤَخَّرُ لَوْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: He [i.e., Allāh] will forgive you of your sins and delay you for a specified term. Indeed, the time [set by] Allāh, when it comes, will not be delayed, if you only knew."

ayahArabic: يَغْفِرْ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمْ وَيُؤَخِّرْكُمْ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّى إِنَّ أَجَلَ ٱللَّهِ إِذَا جَآءَ لَا يُؤَخَّرُ لَوْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: He [i.e., Allāh] will forgive you of your sins and delay you for a specified term. Indeed, the time [set by] Allāh, when it comes, will not be delayed, if you only knew."

targetTranslation: a term/deadline (being acted upon by إِلَىٰٓ - to)
ayahArabic: يَغْفِرْ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمْ وَيُؤَخِّرْكُمْ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّى إِنَّ أَجَلَ ٱللَّهِ إِذَا جَآءَ لَا يُؤَخَّرُ لَوْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: He [i.e., Allāh] will forgive you of your sins and delay you for a specified term. Indeed, the time [set by] Allāh, when it comes, will not be delayed, if you only knew."

ayahEnglish: He [i.e., Allāh] will forgive you of your sins and delay you for a specified term. Indeed, the time [set by] Allāh, when it comes, will not be delayed, if you only knew."

targetTranslation: an appointed term (object of إِلَىٰٓ - towards)

ayahEnglish: He [i.e., Allāh] will forgive you of your sins and delay you for a specified term. Indeed, the time [set by] Allāh, when it comes, will not be delayed, if you only knew."

ayahArabic: يَغْفِرْ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمْ وَيُؤَخِّرْكُمْ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّى إِنَّ أَجَلَ ٱللَّهِ إِذَا جَآءَ لَا يُؤَخَّرُ لَوْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: He [i.e., Allāh] will forgive you of your sins and delay you for a specified term. Indeed, the time [set by] Allāh, when it comes, will not be delayed, if you only knew."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى دَعَوْتُ قَوْمِى لَيْلًا وَنَهَارًا
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, indeed I invited my people [to truth] night and day.

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى دَعَوْتُ قَوْمِى لَيْلًا وَنَهَارًا
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, indeed I invited my people [to truth] night and day.

targetTranslation: I called out (to قَوْمِى my people)
ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى دَعَوْتُ قَوْمِى لَيْلًا وَنَهَارًا
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, indeed I invited my people [to truth] night and day.

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى دَعَوْتُ قَوْمِى لَيْلًا وَنَهَارًا
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, indeed I invited my people [to truth] night and day.

targetTranslation: at night (time when دَعَوْتُ/I called happened)
ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى دَعَوْتُ قَوْمِى لَيْلًا وَنَهَارًا
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, indeed I invited my people [to truth] night and day.

targetTranslation: he makes more of them/adds to them (object of فَلَمْ)
ayahArabic: فَلَمْ يَزِدْهُمْ دُعَآءِىٓ إِلَّا فِرَارًا
ayahEnglish: But my invitation increased them not except in flight [i.e., aversion].

ayahArabic: فَلَمْ يَزِدْهُمْ دُعَآءِىٓ إِلَّا فِرَارًا
ayahEnglish: But my invitation increased them not except in flight [i.e., aversion].

targetTranslation: running away (as the thing being increased in يَزِدْهُمْ)
ayahArabic: فَلَمْ يَزِدْهُمْ دُعَآءِىٓ إِلَّا فِرَارًا
ayahEnglish: But my invitation increased them not except in flight [i.e., aversion].

targetTranslation: whenever (used with دَعَوْتُهُمْ - I called them)
ayahArabic: وَإِنِّى كُلَّمَا دَعَوْتُهُمْ لِتَغْفِرَ لَهُمْ جَعَلُوٓا۟ أَصٰبِعَهُمْ فِىٓ ءَاذَانِهِمْ وَٱسْتَغْشَوْا۟ ثِيَابَهُمْ وَأَصَرُّوا۟ وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ ٱسْتِكْبَارًا
ayahEnglish: And indeed, every time I invited them that You may forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, covered themselves with their garments, persisted, and were arrogant with [great] arrogance.

targetTranslation: I called them (referring to those who Noah was inviting to faith)
ayahArabic: وَإِنِّى كُلَّمَا دَعَوْتُهُمْ لِتَغْفِرَ لَهُمْ جَعَلُوٓا۟ أَصٰبِعَهُمْ فِىٓ ءَاذَانِهِمْ وَٱسْتَغْشَوْا۟ ثِيَابَهُمْ وَأَصَرُّوا۟ وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ ٱسْتِكْبَارًا
ayahEnglish: And indeed, every time I invited them that You may forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, covered themselves with their garments, persisted, and were arrogant with [great] arrogance.

ayahArabic: وَإِنِّى كُلَّمَا دَعَوْتُهُمْ لِتَغْفِرَ لَهُمْ جَعَلُوٓا۟ أَصٰبِعَهُمْ فِىٓ ءَاذَانِهِمْ وَٱسْتَغْشَوْا۟ ثِيَابَهُمْ وَأَصَرُّوا۟ وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ ٱسْتِكْبَارًا
ayahEnglish: And indeed, every time I invited them that You may forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, covered themselves with their garments, persisted, and were arrogant with [great] arrogance.

ayahArabic: وَإِنِّى كُلَّمَا دَعَوْتُهُمْ لِتَغْفِرَ لَهُمْ جَعَلُوٓا۟ أَصٰبِعَهُمْ فِىٓ ءَاذَانِهِمْ وَٱسْتَغْشَوْا۟ ثِيَابَهُمْ وَأَصَرُّوا۟ وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ ٱسْتِكْبَارًا
ayahEnglish: And indeed, every time I invited them that You may forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, covered themselves with their garments, persisted, and were arrogant with [great] arrogance.

ayahArabic: وَإِنِّى كُلَّمَا دَعَوْتُهُمْ لِتَغْفِرَ لَهُمْ جَعَلُوٓا۟ أَصٰبِعَهُمْ فِىٓ ءَاذَانِهِمْ وَٱسْتَغْشَوْا۟ ثِيَابَهُمْ وَأَصَرُّوا۟ وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ ٱسْتِكْبَارًا
ayahEnglish: And indeed, every time I invited them that You may forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, covered themselves with their garments, persisted, and were arrogant with [great] arrogance.

targetTranslation: their clothes (object of وَٱسْتَغْشَوْا۟ - they covered)
ayahArabic: وَإِنِّى كُلَّمَا دَعَوْتُهُمْ لِتَغْفِرَ لَهُمْ جَعَلُوٓا۟ أَصٰبِعَهُمْ فِىٓ ءَاذَانِهِمْ وَٱسْتَغْشَوْا۟ ثِيَابَهُمْ وَأَصَرُّوا۟ وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ ٱسْتِكْبَارًا
ayahEnglish: And indeed, every time I invited them that You may forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, covered themselves with their garments, persisted, and were arrogant with [great] arrogance.

targetTranslation: arrogance (as the object being acted upon)
ayahArabic: وَإِنِّى كُلَّمَا دَعَوْتُهُمْ لِتَغْفِرَ لَهُمْ جَعَلُوٓا۟ أَصٰبِعَهُمْ فِىٓ ءَاذَانِهِمْ وَٱسْتَغْشَوْا۟ ثِيَابَهُمْ وَأَصَرُّوا۟ وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ ٱسْتِكْبَارًا
ayahEnglish: And indeed, every time I invited them that You may forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, covered themselves with their garments, persisted, and were arrogant with [great] arrogance.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ إِنِّى دَعَوْتُهُمْ جِهَارًا
ayahEnglish: Then I invited them publicly.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ إِنِّى دَعَوْتُهُمْ جِهَارًا
ayahEnglish: Then I invited them publicly.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ إِنِّىٓ أَعْلَنتُ لَهُمْ وَأَسْرَرْتُ لَهُمْ إِسْرَارًا
ayahEnglish: Then I announced to them and [also] confided to them secretly

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ إِنِّىٓ أَعْلَنتُ لَهُمْ وَأَسْرَرْتُ لَهُمْ إِسْرَارًا
ayahEnglish: Then I announced to them and [also] confided to them secretly

targetTranslation: seek forgiveness! (all of you) (command to the people in فَقُلْتُ)
ayahArabic: فَقُلْتُ ٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ غَفَّارًا
ayahEnglish: And said, 'Ask forgiveness of your Lord. Indeed, He is ever a Perpetual Forgiver.

ayahArabic: فَقُلْتُ ٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ غَفَّارًا
ayahEnglish: And said, 'Ask forgiveness of your Lord. Indeed, He is ever a Perpetual Forgiver.

targetTranslation: he was (describing how Allah is غَفَّارًا/forgiving)
ayahArabic: فَقُلْتُ ٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ غَفَّارًا
ayahEnglish: And said, 'Ask forgiveness of your Lord. Indeed, He is ever a Perpetual Forgiver.

targetTranslation: constantly forgiving (as a description being used)
ayahArabic: فَقُلْتُ ٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ غَفَّارًا
ayahEnglish: And said, 'Ask forgiveness of your Lord. Indeed, He is ever a Perpetual Forgiver.

ayahArabic: يُرْسِلِ ٱلسَّمَآءَ عَلَيْكُم مِّدْرَارًا
ayahEnglish: He will send [rain from] the sky upon you in [continuing] showers

targetTranslation: abundantly (describing how السماء/the sky/rain is sent)
ayahArabic: يُرْسِلِ ٱلسَّمَآءَ عَلَيْكُم مِّدْرَارًا
ayahEnglish: He will send [rain from] the sky upon you in [continuing] showers

targetTranslation: gardens (as the object being made for you)
ayahArabic: وَيُمْدِدْكُم بِأَمْوٰلٍ وَبَنِينَ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ جَنَّاتٍ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ أَنْهٰرًا
ayahEnglish: And give you increase in wealth and children and provide for you gardens and provide for you rivers.

ayahArabic: وَيُمْدِدْكُم بِأَمْوٰلٍ وَبَنِينَ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ جَنَّاتٍ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ أَنْهٰرًا
ayahEnglish: And give you increase in wealth and children and provide for you gardens and provide for you rivers.

targetTranslation: what (is wrong with you) - expressing surprise or criticism
ayahArabic: مَّا لَكُمْ لَا تَرْجُونَ لِلَّهِ وَقَارًا
ayahEnglish: What is [the matter] with you that you do not attribute to Allāh [due] grandeur

ayahArabic: مَّا لَكُمْ لَا تَرْجُونَ لِلَّهِ وَقَارًا
ayahEnglish: What is [the matter] with you that you do not attribute to Allāh [due] grandeur

targetTranslation: dignity/majesty (object of تَرْجُونَ - you hope for)
ayahArabic: مَّا لَكُمْ لَا تَرْجُونَ لِلَّهِ وَقَارًا
ayahEnglish: What is [the matter] with you that you do not attribute to Allāh [due] grandeur

targetTranslation: he created you all (object of قَدْ before it)
ayahArabic: وَقَدْ خَلَقَكُمْ أَطْوَارًا
ayahEnglish: While He has created you in stages?

targetTranslation: stages, phases (as the object being acted upon in خَلَقَكُمْ - He created you)
ayahArabic: وَقَدْ خَلَقَكُمْ أَطْوَارًا
ayahEnglish: While He has created you in stages?

targetTranslation: Have (you) not...? (expecting 'yes, we have' as answer)
ayahArabic: أَلَمْ تَرَوْا۟ كَيْفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبْعَ سَمٰوٰتٍ طِبَاقًا
ayahEnglish: Do you not consider how Allāh has created seven heavens in layers

ayahArabic: أَلَمْ تَرَوْا۟ كَيْفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبْعَ سَمٰوٰتٍ طِبَاقًا
ayahEnglish: Do you not consider how Allāh has created seven heavens in layers

ayahArabic: أَلَمْ تَرَوْا۟ كَيْفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبْعَ سَمٰوٰتٍ طِبَاقًا
ayahEnglish: Do you not consider how Allāh has created seven heavens in layers

ayahArabic: أَلَمْ تَرَوْا۟ كَيْفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبْعَ سَمٰوٰتٍ طِبَاقًا
ayahEnglish: Do you not consider how Allāh has created seven heavens in layers

targetTranslation: Allah (the one true God who created seven heavens)
ayahArabic: أَلَمْ تَرَوْا۟ كَيْفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبْعَ سَمٰوٰتٍ طِبَاقًا
ayahEnglish: Do you not consider how Allāh has created seven heavens in layers

ayahArabic: أَلَمْ تَرَوْا۟ كَيْفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبْعَ سَمٰوٰتٍ طِبَاقًا
ayahEnglish: Do you not consider how Allāh has created seven heavens in layers

ayahArabic: أَلَمْ تَرَوْا۟ كَيْفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبْعَ سَمٰوٰتٍ طِبَاقًا
ayahEnglish: Do you not consider how Allāh has created seven heavens in layers

targetTranslation: in layers (describing how سَمٰوٰتٍ/heavens are arranged)
ayahArabic: أَلَمْ تَرَوْا۟ كَيْفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبْعَ سَمٰوٰتٍ طِبَاقًا
ayahEnglish: Do you not consider how Allāh has created seven heavens in layers

targetTranslation: a light (object of جَعَلَ - He made)
ayahArabic: وَجَعَلَ ٱلْقَمَرَ فِيهِنَّ نُورًا وَجَعَلَ ٱلشَّمْسَ سِرَاجًا
ayahEnglish: And made the moon therein a [reflected] light and made the sun a burning lamp?

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلَ ٱلْقَمَرَ فِيهِنَّ نُورًا وَجَعَلَ ٱلشَّمْسَ سِرَاجًا
ayahEnglish: And made the moon therein a [reflected] light and made the sun a burning lamp?

targetTranslation: He caused you all to grow (Allah caused you to grow from الْأَرْضِ)
ayahArabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَنۢبَتَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ نَبَاتًا
ayahEnglish: And Allāh has caused you to grow from the earth a [progressive] growth.

ayahArabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَنۢبَتَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ نَبَاتًا
ayahEnglish: And Allāh has caused you to grow from the earth a [progressive] growth.

targetTranslation: he will return you all (into the earth)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ يُعِيدُكُمْ فِيهَا وَيُخْرِجُكُمْ إِخْرَاجًا
ayahEnglish: Then He will return you into it and extract you [another] extraction.

targetTranslation: a bringing out (object of يُخْرِجُكُمْ - He brings you out)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ يُعِيدُكُمْ فِيهَا وَيُخْرِجُكُمْ إِخْرَاجًا
ayahEnglish: Then He will return you into it and extract you [another] extraction.

targetTranslation: he made (connected to لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ - for you the earth)
ayahArabic: وَٱللَّهُ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ بِسَاطًا
ayahEnglish: And Allāh has made for you the earth an expanse

ayahArabic: وَٱللَّهُ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ بِسَاطًا
ayahEnglish: And Allāh has made for you the earth an expanse

targetTranslation: paths (object of لِتَسْلُكُوا - for you to travel upon)
ayahArabic: لِّتَسْلُكُوا۟ مِنْهَا سُبُلًا فِجَاجًا
ayahEnglish: That you may follow therein roads of passage.'"

ayahArabic: لِّتَسْلُكُوا۟ مِنْهَا سُبُلًا فِجَاجًا
ayahEnglish: That you may follow therein roads of passage.'"

ayahArabic: قَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ إِنَّهُمْ عَصَوْنِى وَٱتَّبَعُوا۟ مَن لَّمْ يَزِدْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَوَلَدُهُۥٓ إِلَّا خَسَارًا
ayahEnglish: Noah said, "My Lord, indeed they have disobeyed me and followed him whose wealth and children will not increase him except in loss.

ayahArabic: قَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ إِنَّهُمْ عَصَوْنِى وَٱتَّبَعُوا۟ مَن لَّمْ يَزِدْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَوَلَدُهُۥٓ إِلَّا خَسَارًا
ayahEnglish: Noah said, "My Lord, indeed they have disobeyed me and followed him whose wealth and children will not increase him except in loss.

targetTranslation: O my Lord! (addressing Allah in Nuh's speech)
ayahArabic: قَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ إِنَّهُمْ عَصَوْنِى وَٱتَّبَعُوا۟ مَن لَّمْ يَزِدْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَوَلَدُهُۥٓ إِلَّا خَسَارًا
ayahEnglish: Noah said, "My Lord, indeed they have disobeyed me and followed him whose wealth and children will not increase him except in loss.

ayahArabic: قَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ إِنَّهُمْ عَصَوْنِى وَٱتَّبَعُوا۟ مَن لَّمْ يَزِدْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَوَلَدُهُۥٓ إِلَّا خَسَارًا
ayahEnglish: Noah said, "My Lord, indeed they have disobeyed me and followed him whose wealth and children will not increase him except in loss.

ayahArabic: قَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ إِنَّهُمْ عَصَوْنِى وَٱتَّبَعُوا۟ مَن لَّمْ يَزِدْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَوَلَدُهُۥٓ إِلَّا خَسَارًا
ayahEnglish: Noah said, "My Lord, indeed they have disobeyed me and followed him whose wealth and children will not increase him except in loss.

ayahArabic: قَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ إِنَّهُمْ عَصَوْنِى وَٱتَّبَعُوا۟ مَن لَّمْ يَزِدْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَوَلَدُهُۥٓ إِلَّا خَسَارًا
ayahEnglish: Noah said, "My Lord, indeed they have disobeyed me and followed him whose wealth and children will not increase him except in loss.

ayahArabic: قَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ إِنَّهُمْ عَصَوْنِى وَٱتَّبَعُوا۟ مَن لَّمْ يَزِدْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَوَلَدُهُۥٓ إِلَّا خَسَارًا
ayahEnglish: Noah said, "My Lord, indeed they have disobeyed me and followed him whose wealth and children will not increase him except in loss.

targetTranslation: a loss (as the object being described in this ayah)
ayahArabic: قَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ إِنَّهُمْ عَصَوْنِى وَٱتَّبَعُوا۟ مَن لَّمْ يَزِدْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَوَلَدُهُۥٓ إِلَّا خَسَارًا
ayahEnglish: Noah said, "My Lord, indeed they have disobeyed me and followed him whose wealth and children will not increase him except in loss.

targetTranslation: a mighty plot (object of مَكَرُوا - they plotted)
ayahArabic: وَمَكَرُوا۟ مَكْرًا كُبَّارًا
ayahEnglish: And they conspired an immense conspiracy

ayahArabic: وَمَكَرُوا۟ مَكْرًا كُبَّارًا
ayahEnglish: And they conspired an immense conspiracy

targetTranslation: you all must not leave (emphatic prohibition)
ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَا تَذَرُنَّ ءَالِهَتَكُمْ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدًّا وَلَا سُوَاعًا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسْرًا
ayahEnglish: And said, 'Never leave your gods and never leave Wadd or Suwāʿ or Yaghūth and Yaʿūq and Nasr.'

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَا تَذَرُنَّ ءَالِهَتَكُمْ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدًّا وَلَا سُوَاعًا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسْرًا
ayahEnglish: And said, 'Never leave your gods and never leave Wadd or Suwāʿ or Yaghūth and Yaʿūq and Nasr.'

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَا تَذَرُنَّ ءَالِهَتَكُمْ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدًّا وَلَا سُوَاعًا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسْرًا
ayahEnglish: And said, 'Never leave your gods and never leave Wadd or Suwāʿ or Yaghūth and Yaʿūq and Nasr.'

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَا تَذَرُنَّ ءَالِهَتَكُمْ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدًّا وَلَا سُوَاعًا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسْرًا
ayahEnglish: And said, 'Never leave your gods and never leave Wadd or Suwāʿ or Yaghūth and Yaʿūq and Nasr.'

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَا تَذَرُنَّ ءَالِهَتَكُمْ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدًّا وَلَا سُوَاعًا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسْرًا
ayahEnglish: And said, 'Never leave your gods and never leave Wadd or Suwāʿ or Yaghūth and Yaʿūq and Nasr.'

targetTranslation: Yaghuth (object of تَذَرُنَّ - do not leave)
ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَا تَذَرُنَّ ءَالِهَتَكُمْ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدًّا وَلَا سُوَاعًا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسْرًا
ayahEnglish: And said, 'Never leave your gods and never leave Wadd or Suwāʿ or Yaghūth and Yaʿūq and Nasr.'

targetTranslation: they made (many) lose the right path (acted on كَثِيرًا)
ayahArabic: وَقَدْ أَضَلُّوا۟ كَثِيرًا وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلٰلًا
ayahEnglish: And already they have misled many. And, [my Lord], do not increase the wrongdoers except in error."

ayahArabic: وَقَدْ أَضَلُّوا۟ كَثِيرًا وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلٰلًا
ayahEnglish: And already they have misled many. And, [my Lord], do not increase the wrongdoers except in error."

ayahArabic: وَقَدْ أَضَلُّوا۟ كَثِيرًا وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلٰلًا
ayahEnglish: And already they have misled many. And, [my Lord], do not increase the wrongdoers except in error."

targetTranslation: wandering off (as the thing being increased)
ayahArabic: وَقَدْ أَضَلُّوا۟ كَثِيرًا وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلٰلًا
ayahEnglish: And already they have misled many. And, [my Lord], do not increase the wrongdoers except in error."

ayahArabic: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـٰٔتِهِمْ أُغْرِقُوا۟ فَأُدْخِلُوا۟ نَارًا فَلَمْ يَجِدُوا۟ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارًا
ayahEnglish: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allāh [any] helpers.

ayahArabic: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـٰٔتِهِمْ أُغْرِقُوا۟ فَأُدْخِلُوا۟ نَارًا فَلَمْ يَجِدُوا۟ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارًا
ayahEnglish: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allāh [any] helpers.

targetTranslation: a fire (object of أُدْخِلُوا - they were made to enter)
ayahArabic: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـٰٔتِهِمْ أُغْرِقُوا۟ فَأُدْخِلُوا۟ نَارًا فَلَمْ يَجِدُوا۟ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارًا
ayahEnglish: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allāh [any] helpers.

ayahArabic: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـٰٔتِهِمْ أُغْرِقُوا۟ فَأُدْخِلُوا۟ نَارًا فَلَمْ يَجِدُوا۟ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارًا
ayahEnglish: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allāh [any] helpers.

ayahArabic: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـٰٔتِهِمْ أُغْرِقُوا۟ فَأُدْخِلُوا۟ نَارًا فَلَمْ يَجِدُوا۟ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارًا
ayahEnglish: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allāh [any] helpers.

ayahArabic: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـٰٔتِهِمْ أُغْرِقُوا۟ فَأُدْخِلُوا۟ نَارًا فَلَمْ يَجِدُوا۟ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارًا
ayahEnglish: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allāh [any] helpers.

targetTranslation: helpers/supporters (as the object being searched for)
ayahArabic: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـٰٔتِهِمْ أُغْرِقُوا۟ فَأُدْخِلُوا۟ نَارًا فَلَمْ يَجِدُوا۟ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارًا
ayahEnglish: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allāh [any] helpers.

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرْ عَلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ مِنَ ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ دَيَّارًا
ayahEnglish: And Noah said, "My Lord, do not leave upon the earth from among the disbelievers an inhabitant.

targetTranslation: O my Lord! (Nuh speaking to Allah)
ayahArabic: وَقَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرْ عَلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ مِنَ ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ دَيَّارًا
ayahEnglish: And Noah said, "My Lord, do not leave upon the earth from among the disbelievers an inhabitant.

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرْ عَلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ مِنَ ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ دَيَّارًا
ayahEnglish: And Noah said, "My Lord, do not leave upon the earth from among the disbelievers an inhabitant.

targetTranslation: a single dweller (object of تَذَرْ - do not leave)
ayahArabic: وَقَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرْ عَلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ مِنَ ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ دَيَّارًا
ayahEnglish: And Noah said, "My Lord, do not leave upon the earth from among the disbelievers an inhabitant.

targetTranslation: you leave them (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier)
ayahArabic: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرْهُمْ يُضِلُّوا۟ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوٓا۟ إِلَّا فَاجِرًا كَفَّارًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever.

ayahArabic: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرْهُمْ يُضِلُّوا۟ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوٓا۟ إِلَّا فَاجِرًا كَفَّارًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever.

targetTranslation: Your servants (object of يُضِلُّوا/they lead astray)
ayahArabic: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرْهُمْ يُضِلُّوا۟ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوٓا۟ إِلَّا فَاجِرًا كَفَّارًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever.

ayahArabic: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرْهُمْ يُضِلُّوا۟ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوٓا۟ إِلَّا فَاجِرًا كَفَّارًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever.

ayahArabic: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرْهُمْ يُضِلُّوا۟ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوٓا۟ إِلَّا فَاجِرًا كَفَّارًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever.

targetTranslation: a constant rejecter of truth (describing the wicked person فَاجِرًا)
ayahArabic: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرْهُمْ يُضِلُّوا۟ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوٓا۟ إِلَّا فَاجِرًا كَفَّارًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever.

ayahArabic: رَّبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَلِوٰلِدَىَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيْتِىَ مُؤْمِنًا وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنٰتِ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارًۢا
ayahEnglish: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction."

targetTranslation: forgive! (a request to Allah in this prayer)
ayahArabic: رَّبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَلِوٰلِدَىَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيْتِىَ مُؤْمِنًا وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنٰتِ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارًۢا
ayahEnglish: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction."

targetTranslation: he entered (action before بَيْتِىَ my house)
ayahArabic: رَّبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَلِوٰلِدَىَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيْتِىَ مُؤْمِنًا وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنٰتِ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارًۢا
ayahEnglish: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction."

ayahArabic: رَّبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَلِوٰلِدَىَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيْتِىَ مُؤْمِنًا وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنٰتِ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارًۢا
ayahEnglish: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction."

targetTranslation: a believer (as object of دَخَلَ - entered)
ayahArabic: رَّبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَلِوٰلِدَىَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيْتِىَ مُؤْمِنًا وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنٰتِ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارًۢا
ayahEnglish: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction."

ayahArabic: رَّبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَلِوٰلِدَىَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيْتِىَ مُؤْمِنًا وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنٰتِ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارًۢا
ayahEnglish: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction."

ayahArabic: رَّبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَلِوٰلِدَىَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيْتِىَ مُؤْمِنًا وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنٰتِ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارًۢا
ayahEnglish: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction."
